english.headline: First Bounce: Number 13 Begins the Journey
english.commentator: Anzac Day at Frankland Park, and there's a new name to watch for Hammond Park — number 13, Alek, out for his first game of the season! The Hurricanes were unstoppable today, running out enormous winners 117 to 12, and for Alek this one was all about finding his feet at this level: feeling the pace, reading the play, learning where to be. He had a shot at goal and you can tell he'll be hungry to make the next one count. No numbers on the board just yet — but every champion starts somewhere, and today, with those orange boots on the Frankland Park grass, Alek took his first step. Welcome to the season, number 13 — this is just the beginning!
